Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew head down to East Cape, also know as the gem of Baja Mexico and stay at Hotel Buena Vista Beach Resort for the fifth year in a row. After checking in, we head off for some epic tuna and marlin fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — Hot Bite in Baja
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Fall Walleye Challenge

Video.summary: Spring Walleye fishing on Horwood Lake friendly competition with local anglers using crank baits and jigging.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Friend and fellow Michigander, Brian McCarter turns Kim on to a productive pattern for autumn largemouths. Suspended schools of bluegills set the stage for this informative episode. The Strike King Sexy Spoon is the featured lure.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Hook Em'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: More of Lake Huron Walleye Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Putting Okumas new Serrano Series Bass Rods to the test, Shea McIntee heads out with a good friend and local guide, Todd Kline, for an epic day of early winter Bass fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Winter Bass Fishing at Lake Perris
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In 1966, a 19-year-old, Wisconsin farm boy's life changed forever when he was drafted into the Army and shipped over to Vietnam. Now a soldier, Glenn engaged in numerous battles, and scouted for the infamous "tunnel rats" in the Vietnam War. The lone survivor in his platoon, the most heart-breaking s
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Veteran Glenn Franks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jeremy Smith break out the bass gear for an early-summer run on a Midwestern natural lake and find epic bites in shallow-water junk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge - Junk Fishin' Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw fishes New York's crystalline St. Lawrence River for smallmouth bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — St Lawrence Smallmouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry fishes with some military vets for a walleye grand slam.
Video.title: Warrior Walleye Shootout

Video.summary: This week's show we're finally back on the ice and nothing better to make sure all your gear is set to go without bringing everything on about 3 inches of ice safety is everything!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.
